implemented.summary: Added a deterministic delivered-status rule for held public-engagement meeting timeline events. The rule is scoped to entity subjects, event objects, public_engagement meeting-kind events, non-work-plan citing sources, comparable month/day event and source dates where the event is not after the source, occurrence text such as held/meeting minutes/called to order, and guards for no-meeting/no-items/postponed/deferred/cancelled/scheduled/approval-agenda text.

verification.details: Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; SQLite FTS quick_check: ok
Submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334; Issues 0

intentionally_unresolved: Public-engagement meeting rows without source dates, event dates, or occurrence text remain unknown.
No-meeting/no-items, future event dates, work-plan rows, source-subject rows, and approval-agenda text are not marked delivered by this rule.
Some work-plan meeting rows remain planned under the pre-existing work-plan timeline classifier; this rule does not override them to delivered.
No canonical JSONL was hand-edited; canonical relations and SQLite were refreshed by deterministic materialization.
next_lanes: Continue metric_context.has_metric residual cleanup with exact-name/unit/period guards.
Scout claim_context.has_claim and agency_role residuals for patch-ready deterministic assertion rules.
Periodically recheck route/project duplicate pressure, but the current high-confidence duplicate backlog remains drained.
